summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Steel Microstructure AI with new light theme (Skydash style). All requested features working correctly including light background, sidebar navigation, split input cards, colorful stat cards, and Fe-C Phase Diagram removal.

design_issues.issue: Recharts showing console warnings about width/height dimensions
design_issues.symptoms: Console logs show 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0'
design_issues.impact: Charts still render correctly, only console warnings

passed_tests: Sidebar navigation displays all 4 items (Dashboard, Predictions, History, Settings)
Chemical Composition card shows C%, Mn%, Si% sliders with proper data-testid
Processing Parameters card shows Temp, Time, Treatment, Cooling Rate controls
Predict button works and triggers successful predictions
Stat cards display Last Regime, Yield Strength, Hardness, Elongation with gradients
Phase Fractions display with progress bars (Ferrite, Pearlite)
Mechanical Properties show in colorful gradient cards
Phase Distribution charts render (Pie, Bar, Radar - 3 containers found)
Prediction History table displays 12+ records with Clear All functionality
Fe-C Phase Diagram correctly removed as requested
Mobile responsiveness - sidebar hidden, cards stack properly
White dashboard cards with proper shadows and styling
Regime Info modal opens and closes correctly
All sidebar navigation items clickable and functional
Form sliders and inputs work on both desktop and mobile
Prediction results display with confidence percentage
Phase fractions show proper percentages and colors
Processing summary shows temperature, time, rate, treatment
